violations.text: The corner trim pieces on the walls outside the walk in cooler, and on the wall going toward the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, pulled away with pieces missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The hand-washing sink in one toilet room was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Working containers (spray bottle) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer, and dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Middle refrigeration unit was at 44 degrees F and must be adjusted to 41 degrees F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and the space beneath in the front area, and a plastic dunnage rack have an accumulation of dust, soil residue, and other debris. The nonfood contact surface of the conveyor oven has an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The fan cover in the walk in cooler has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The door handle of the walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
